_comment: 《铃兰穿越记》第002集·爆点版(new_story/arc-01 · 002《我教你的第一句中文，是"听不懂"》)。💣本集爆点=保命的第一句中文不是'你好',是装傻的'听不懂'——把语言死穴反手变成护身符。★黄金3秒(script-rules 0):首帧=她双手死死捂住自己的嘴(画面=一开口就完了),前3拍自证(假新娘+今天验身死局),禁裸承接。触发器:与我有关(越南假新娘=我)+生死利害(开口即死)+好奇缺口(三个字是什么/骗得过吗)≥3。人设口径(2026-07-16修正):半吊子中文——能抓'医生/到了'等高频词,说不成句;全剧禁'一句中文都不会/一个字都听不懂'(script-rules 1-2)。本集中文:听不懂。连戏:女主整集红嫁衣(婚礼线至E06);小桃=wardrobe v2七要素look(2026-07-16重画,旧奶白棉背心+裸粉百褶裙被否):象牙白真丝缎蕾丝饰边细吊带(缎面光泽·微露腰)+雾霾蓝缎面高腰侧开衩短裙+细金腰链+小金圈耳环+细金项链+裸色细带高跟,低马尾齐刘海不变,s2/s3同款连戏。图:s4-practice/s5-door/s6-fear 复用 07/15 已验收图(女主红嫁衣/空镜,合规),s1-panic/s2-threewords/s3-pantomime 新出。尾钩=门外脚步声,医生提前到了(=E03头钩)。

shots.content: The stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in the SAME ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery from the wedding night, veil removed, long black hair loose and slightly disheveled, standing beside the carved wedding bed in the opulent Chinese mansion bedroom, pale morning light through window lattice mixing with burnt-out red candles, BOTH HANDS CLAMPED tightly over her own mouth, eyes enormous and terrified staring straight ahead, shoulders hunched in panic as if one spoken word would kill her, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO foreground figure, her single face in frame. Cinematic medium close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Hôm nay bác sĩ sẽ đến khám người
tôi hé miệng là xong đời
Tôi là cô dâu giả đến từ Việt Nam
Đến 'đau đầu' tôi cũng chẳng biết nói

shots.content: Full-body luxury fashion-editorial wide shot of the sweet young Chinese maid Xiao Tao with straight bangs and a sleek low ponytail with face-framing strands, slim slender long-legged figure — wearing a fashionable, tastefully sexy TWO-PIECE look styled by a celebrity fashion stylist: an ivory silk-satin camisole with delicate THIN spaghetti straps and fine French lace trim along the neckline, with a soft luxurious sheen, fitted and slightly cropped to bare a sliver of her slim waist (NOT a plain cotton tank top, NOT thick straps, NOT a bustier, NOT a cheap dance costume), paired with a SEPARATE high-waisted dusty-blue silk-satin mini skirt with a subtle side slit draping elegantly over her hips (NOT a pleated school skirt), a delicate thin gold waist chain, small gold hoop earrings and a dainty gold pendant necklace, strappy nude high heels, subtle elegant makeup with glossy lips — like a Vogue high-fashion editorial / luxury lookbook, trendy, elegant, tastefully sexy, SFW — showing her very fair slim long bare legs. Her skin is uniformly very fair porcelain-pale, the EXACT same pale tone on her face, neck, shoulders, arms, hands, legs and feet, NO two-tone skin, NO tanned or ruddy or yellowish limbs, NO color mismatch, NO tan lines. She stands completely ALONE in the frame, absolutely NO other person, NO foreground figure, NO listener visible — leaning slightly forward teaching toward the camera, mouth open mid-word enunciating each syllable, holding up THREE fingers of one hand with an encouraging earnest expression, bright morning light in a blurred opulent Chinese mansion bedroom, her whole body visible with high heels on the floor in correct realistic proportion. Cinematic full-body shot. Landscape.

captions.pinyin: tài tai jì zhù sān gè zì
captions.local: Phu nhân, nhớ kỹ ba chữ này
Tīng bù dǒng — nghe không hiểu

shots.content: Full-body luxury fashion-editorial wide shot of the sweet young Chinese maid Xiao Tao with straight bangs and a sleek low ponytail with face-framing strands, slim slender long-legged figure — wearing the SAME fashionable two-piece look as the previous scene (continuity): an ivory silk-satin camisole with delicate THIN spaghetti straps and fine French lace trim along the neckline, with a soft luxurious sheen, fitted and slightly cropped to bare a sliver of her slim waist (NOT a plain cotton tank top, NOT thick straps, NOT a bustier, NOT a cheap dance costume), a SEPARATE high-waisted dusty-blue silk-satin mini skirt with a subtle side slit draping elegantly over her hips (NOT a pleated school skirt), a delicate thin gold waist chain, small gold hoop earrings and a dainty gold pendant necklace, strappy nude high heels, subtle elegant makeup with glossy lips — like a Vogue high-fashion editorial / luxury lookbook, trendy, elegant, tastefully sexy, SFW — showing her very fair slim long bare legs. Her skin is uniformly very fair porcelain-pale, the EXACT same pale tone on her face, neck, shoulders, arms, hands, legs and feet, NO two-tone skin, NO tanned or ruddy or yellowish limbs, NO color mismatch, NO tan lines. She stands completely ALONE in the frame, absolutely NO other person, NO foreground figure — playfully DEMONSTRATING how to play dumb: shaking her head with an exaggerated innocent blank clueless expression, shoulders shrugged high, both palms turned up at her sides, mouth in a small 'I have no idea' pout, bright morning light in the blurred opulent Chinese mansion bedroom, her whole body visible with high heels on the floor in correct realistic proportion. Cinematic full-body shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Cô ấy lắc đầu, mặt ngơ ngác
Giả ngơ chính là bùa hộ mệnh của tôi

shots.content: Close-up of the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in the SAME ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery, veil removed, long black hair loose, sitting at the edge of the carved wedding bed practicing speaking — lips parted mid-word, brow furrowed in fierce concentration, hands clenched on her lap, soft morning light, single face in frame. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Một câu, cô luyện cả trăm lần

shots.content: Tall ornate carved wooden double doors of a luxurious Chinese mansion bedroom, TIGHTLY CLOSED, seen straight-on from inside the dim room; warm hallway light leaks through the narrow gap under the closed doors, and in that strip of light the dark shadow of two feet is standing right outside the door, tense ominous thriller mood, absolutely no people visible inside the room. Cinematic landscape still.

captions.local: Bỗng ngoài cửa có tiếng bước chân

captions.pinyin: yī shēng tí qián dào le

shots.content: Exactly ONE woman alone in frame — the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in the SAME ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery, long loose black hair — inside the SAME dim opulent Chinese mansion bedroom as the previous scenes: dark carved wooden walls and pillars, red silk bedding, warm candle-and-morning mixed light. She presses her back flat against a carved dark-wood pillar, clutching her red silk skirt with both white-knuckled hands, face turned toward the door with WIDE TERRIFIED eyes and lips parted in panicked shallow breathing; NO mirror, NO reflection, NO second person, her single face in frame. Cinematic medium close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Tôi mới thuộc đúng ba chữ
liệu có lừa nổi bác sĩ
